case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROP SUBJ DISP $600.00 U.S. CURRENCY et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROP SUBJ DISP $600.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100 JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONSENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $600.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT PETER PARADI. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE CASE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
